fields.name: Table ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies a table ID for the account type if you are specifying default dimensions for an entire account type.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the account number you wish to define a default dimension for.

fields.name: Dimension Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the default dimension.

fields.name: Dimension Value Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the dimension value code to suggest as the default dimension.

fields.name: Value Posting
fields.tooltip: Specifies how default dimensions and their values must be used.

fields.name: Table Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the table name for the account type you wish to define a default dimension for.

fields.name: Allowed Values Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies the dimension values that can be used for the selected account.

fields.name: Dimension Value Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of selected dimension value.
